name: Poor Mans Goose (English)
recipeInstructions:
1. Set the oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
2. Take a deep dish and place a few knobs of dripping in the base.
3. Peel, core, and slice the apple. Place a layer on top of the dripping.
4. Sprinkle with sugar.
5. Make up the sage and onion stuffing according to the instructions on the packet.
6. Add a layer of stuffing to the dish.
7. Add slices of liver, seasoned with salt and pepper.
8. Finally, add layers of raw potatoes, cut into thin slices and seasoned lightly.
9. If the dish is deep enough, repeat the layers with additional potato at the top.
10. Dot with dripping and bake for 1 hour.
The texture and flavor of this dish are said to resemble that of roast goose. No exact quantities can be given as it is a 'poor man's dish', made with whatever ingredients are available. Cheese and sliced onion can be used instead of liver.
